Macro# kIOUSBDevicePortWasNotSuspended

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.6+

```
#define kIOUSBDevicePortWasNotSuspended
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/kiousbdeviceportwasnotsuspended#discussion)

Errors specific to the IOUSBFamily. Note that the iokit_usb_err(x) translates to 0xe0004xxx, where xxx is the value in parenthesis as a hex number.
